situation.headline: Strait of Hormuz closure disrupts 10.5 million barrels/day of oil production driving global energy crisis while Iran nuclear program accelerates

domains.name: Middle East
domains.label: regional escalation 90d
domains.status: Iran-US-Israel ceasefire precarious, Hormuz closed through May, new Sunni alliance forming to counter Iran

domains.name: Indo-Pacific
domains.label: China coercion escalation
domains.status: PLA ADIZ incursions down but Taiwan contiguous zone violations increasing while US arms sales under Trump review

domains.name: Europe
domains.label: NATO cohesion fracture
domains.status: Russia could attack NATO within year after Ukraine war ends while US commitment questioned under Trump

domains.name: Energy
domains.label: supply shock 60d
domains.status: Oil at $106/barrel, global inventories falling 8.5 million barrels daily, LNG prices elevated, UAE left OPEC

domains.name: US Politics
domains.label: House flip Nov 2026
domains.status: Democrats overperforming in special elections amid Trump interference concerns but GOP maintains structural advantages

situation.unseen: Ethiopian-Sudanese tensions over Tigray mercenaries in Sudan creating Horn of Africa regional war risk that analysts miss connects directly to UAE-Saudi competition and Egyptian encirclement strategy against Ethiopia
situation.criticalWindow: Late May Strait of Hormuz reopening negotiations between US-Iran through Pakistani mediators while Iran Supreme Leader blocks uranium exports threatening deal collapse
situation.confidenceNote: High confidence on energy crisis impacts but uncertain on Middle East ceasefire durability and whether Europe can deter Russian post-Ukraine aggression timing
situation.topPattern: Global energy crisis from Hormuz closure intersects with weakening alliance structures as regional conflicts increasingly draw in multiple great powers simultaneously

markets.label: GOP Keeps House 2026
markets.rationale: Special election overperformance, retirements, low approval. House flip is base case.

markets.label: Ukraine Ceasefire 2026
markets.rationale: Trump wants exit, Ukraine exhausted, Europe pushing. Russia sees no urgency.

markets.label: China Invades Taiwan 2026
markets.rationale: Window opening but 2027 remains primary PLA readiness target. Gray zone more likely.

markets.label: Oil >$120/bbl 2026
markets.rationale: Hormuz disruption plus supply shock already in progress.

markets.label: Iran Nuclear Deal 2026
markets.rationale: Kinetic operations make diplomatic track nearly impossible near term.

markets.label: Russia Takes Kyiv
markets.rationale: Russia lacks manpower and logistics for capital seizure.
